requirement.title: Project-Level Wisdom System
requirement.body: Durable cross-change learnings must be persisted in a project-level JSONL store to improve agent performance across sessions.

scenarios.title: Durable learning promotion
given: A convention-level learning discovered in a change
then: The entry is appended to project-level wisdom.jsonl

requirement.title: Manifest-Driven Workflow recommendations
requirement.body: Command recommendations in adv-status must be derived from a type-safe workflow manifest to ensure consistent pathing.

scenarios.title: Context-aware recommendations
then: It recommends adv-review or adv-harden based on manifest successors

requirement.title: Adversarial Review Enforcement
requirement.body: /adv-review and /adv-harden must enforce a minimum findings threshold to prevent shallow 'LGTM' behavior.

scenarios.title: Minimum findings validation
given: A review with fewer than 3 non-nit findings
then: The gate remains open and requires explicit justification for the clean result

wisdom.content: Checklists under docs/checklists/ should mirror the structure of the command they enforce: review-checklist.md mirrors adv-review.md's 12 dimensions, harden-checklist.md mirrors adv-harden.md's 5 scanners. The minimum-findings threshold (3+ non-nit) and genuinely-clean justification template are consistent across both.

When expanding a template/scaffold (like proposal.md), update the test expectations first to match the new section names. Old section names in existing tests will silently pass if the new template includes similar strings.

research.completed_by: librarian + adv-researcher sub-agents: validated JSONL wisdom, TS manifest, Markdown checklists, explicit promotion, command-level enforcement

review.completed_by: 12-dimension code review: 1 blocker + 7 issues found and fixed. 496/496 tests pass. Fixes: stale lock race (F1), compaction error handling (F2), duplicate check type field (F3), GateId dedup (F4), skipped gate status (F5), content length limit (F6), JSONL parse logging (F7), dead import cleanup (F8).

signoff.completed_by: User signed off via interactive confirmation
